summary: A 26-second USCIS 'First 100 Days Accomplishments' promo: a graphics title card, then stock-style B-roll of a USCIS building, a naturalization oath being administered, and biometric fingerprinting, closing on a USCIS.gov card. A plain narrator voiceover recaps the agency 'enforcing immigration laws' and 'making America safe again.' It is an informational agency self-promo driven by spoken narration over generic B-roll, not a music-driven cinematic montage or genre experiment, so it does not fit the youth-appeal produced-spectacle category.
notable_text: First 100 Days Accomplishments; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; USCIS.GOV; 'make America safe again'
